message:
Clippy/rustfmt fixes, exhaustive lifecycle tests, and manifest golden vectors

Clippy fixes across connectors:
- datadog: Allow case_sensitive_file_extension_comparisons lint,
  use Duration::from_secs over from_millis, remove unused imports,
  use numeric literal separators for large timestamps
- llm-router: Collapse short assert_eq! strings to single line,
  replace .unwrap()/.unwrap_err() with let-else patterns, use
  std::f64::consts::PI, use Copy semantics instead of .clone()
- microsoft365: Inline single-field struct literals, replace
  .unwrap()/.unwrap_err() with let-else, collapse short patterns
- slack: Allow redundant_clone on test clones, use assert! over
  assert_eq!(_, true), collapse long matches! to multi-line
- twitter: Allow redundant_clone, use format!("{cloned:?}") over
  format!("{:?}", cloned), use numeric separators, inline vec![]
- youtube: Expand inline struct literals for readability, reformat
  long lines, add #[allow(clippy::redundant_clone)] annotations

Rustfmt across fcp crates:
- fcp-cbor: Use char literal in assert contains, collapse
  single-field struct, inline short SchemaId::new call
- fcp-e2e: Reformat multi-line string args, expand assertion msgs
- fcp-oauth: Expand .field() calls for Debug impl readability,
  reformat long assertion messages
- fcp-raptorq: Formatting only (decoder.rs, decode.rs)
- fcp-ratelimit: Formatting changes in leaky_bucket and
  sliding_window
- fcp-sandbox: macos.rs formatting
- fcp-tailscale: Formatting in error.rs, identity.rs, tag.rs

Exhaustive lifecycle state machine tests (fcp-core/lifecycle.rs +517):
- Define ALL_STATES (7 states) and VALID_TRANSITIONS (17 pairs)
- Test all valid transitions succeed
- Test all invalid transitions are rejected
- Per-state tests verifying exact allowed/denied sets
- Health metrics edge cases, latency tracking, concurrent updates
- Transition audit trail completeness

Manifest golden vectors (fcp-manifest +448):
- Add golden vector tests for datadog, elasticsearch, gitlab,
  grafana, hubspot, reddit, and salesforce connector manifests
- Each test validates full manifest parsing including operations,
  rate limits, capabilities, and auth requirements

Also updates CBOR test vectors and beads issue tracker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
